title: corytholoma maculatum
intro: Corytholoma maculatum, also known as the spotted Corytholoma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Corytholoma maculatum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, although its herbal preparations may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
